subject: Life Skills
title: My Community
tagline: Meet community helpers and discover how they keep us safe and healthy!

pins.name: Hospital
facts: Doctors and nurses at the hospital help sick and injured people.
A hospital has an emergency room for urgent care.

pins.name: Police Station
facts: Police officers keep the community safe.
You can call the police in an emergency.

pins.name: Fire Station
facts: Firefighters put out fires and rescue people.
Fire trucks carry water, hoses and ladders.

pins.name: School
facts: Teachers at school help children learn.
Schools have classrooms, a library and a playground.

pins.name: Clinic
facts: A clinic gives check-ups and vaccinations.
Nurses at a clinic care for the community.

pins.name: Post Office
facts: The post office helps send and receive letters and parcels.
You can pay some bills at the post office.

pins.name: Library
facts: A librarian helps you find and borrow books.
Libraries are quiet places to read and study.

pins.name: Market
facts: Vendors at the market sell fresh fruit and vegetables.
Markets are a place where the community buys and sells.

questions.question: Which one is true: "Doctors and nurses at the hospital help sick and injured people."?
questions.feedbackFact: Doctors and nurses at the hospital help sick and injured people.
